clickhouse:
SELECT
    nullIf(nullIf(events.`mat_$pathname`, ''), 'null') AS path,
    uniqIf(nullIf(nullIf(events.`$session_id`, ''), 'null'), and(ifNull(greaterOrEquals(accurateCastOrNull(accurateCastOrNull(has(events.properties_group_custom, %(hogql_val_0)s) ? events.properties_group_custom[%(hogql_val_0)s] : null, %(hogql_val_1)s), %(hogql_val_2)s), 75), 0), greaterOrEquals(toDate(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_3)s)), toDateOrNull(%(hogql_val_4)s)), lessOrEquals(toDate(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_5)s)), toDateOrNull(%(hogql_val_6)s)))) AS s75_cur,
    uniqIf(nullIf(nullIf(events.`$session_id`, ''), 'null'), and(ifNull(greaterOrEquals(accurateCastOrNull(accurateCastOrNull(has(events.properties_group_custom, %(hogql_val_7)s) ? events.properties_group_custom[%(hogql_val_7)s] : null, %(hogql_val_8)s), %(hogql_val_9)s), 75), 0), greaterOrEquals(toDate(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_10)s)), toDateOrNull(%(hogql_val_11)s)), lessOrEquals(toDate(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_12)s)), toDateOrNull(%(hogql_val_13)s)), notEquals(toDate(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_14)s)), toDateOrNull(%(hogql_val_15)s)), notEquals(toDate(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_16)s)), toDateOrNull(%(hogql_val_17)s)), notEquals(toDate(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_18)s)), toDateOrNull(%(hogql_val_19)s)))) AS s75_prior,
    uniqIf(nullIf(nullIf(events.`$session_id`, ''), 'null'), and(ifNull(greaterOrEquals(accurateCastOrNull(accurateCastOrNull(has(events.properties_group_custom, %(hogql_val_20)s) ? events.properties_group_custom[%(hogql_val_20)s] : null, %(hogql_val_21)s), %(hogql_val_22)s), 90), 0), greaterOrEquals(toDate(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_23)s)), toDateOrNull(%(hogql_val_24)s)), lessOrEquals(toDate(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_25)s)), toDateOrNull(%(hogql_val_26)s)))) AS s90_cur,
    uniqIf(nullIf(nullIf(events.`$session_id`, ''), 'null'), and(ifNull(greaterOrEquals(accurateCastOrNull(accurateCastOrNull(has(events.properties_group_custom, %(hogql_val_27)s) ? events.properties_group_custom[%(hogql_val_27)s] : null, %(hogql_val_28)s), %(hogql_val_29)s), 90), 0), greaterOrEquals(toDate(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_30)s)), toDateOrNull(%(hogql_val_31)s)), lessOrEquals(toDate(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_32)s)), toDateOrNull(%(hogql_val_33)s)), notEquals(toDate(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_34)s)), toDateOrNull(%(hogql_val_35)s)), notEquals(toDate(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_36)s)), toDateOrNull(%(hogql_val_37)s)), notEquals(toDate(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_38)s)), toDateOrNull(%(hogql_val_39)s)))) AS s90_prior
FROM
    events
WHERE
    and(equals(events.team_id, 275753), equals(events.event, %(hogql_val_40)s), isNotNull(nullIf(nullIf(events.`mat_$pathname`, ''), 'null')), greaterOrEquals(toDate(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_41)s)), toDateOrNull(%(hogql_val_42)s)), lessOrEquals(toDate(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_43)s)), toDateOrNull(%(hogql_val_44)s)))
GROUP BY
    path
ORDER BY
    plus(s75_cur, s75_prior) DESC
LIMIT 40 SETTINGS readonly=2, max_execution_time=10, max_threads=60, allow_experimental_object_type=1, max_ast_elements=4000000, max_expanded_ast_elements=4000000, max_bytes_before_external_group_by=0, enable_analyzer=1, transform_null_in=1, optimize_min_equality_disjunction_chain_length=4294967295, allow_experimental_join_condition=1, use_hive_partitioning=0
hogql:
SELECT
    properties.$pathname AS path,
    uniqIf(properties.$session_id, and(greaterOrEquals(toFloat(properties.depth_percentage), 75), greaterOrEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-04-29')), lessOrEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-05-12')))) AS s75_cur,
    uniqIf(properties.$session_id, and(greaterOrEquals(toFloat(properties.depth_percentage), 75), greaterOrEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-04-15')), lessOrEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-04-28')), notEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-04-17')), notEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-04-19')), notEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-04-20')))) AS s75_prior,
    uniqIf(properties.$session_id, and(greaterOrEquals(toFloat(properties.depth_percentage), 90), greaterOrEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-04-29')), lessOrEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-05-12')))) AS s90_cur,
    uniqIf(properties.$session_id, and(greaterOrEquals(toFloat(properties.depth_percentage), 90), greaterOrEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-04-15')), lessOrEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-04-28')), notEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-04-17')), notEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-04-19')), notEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-04-20')))) AS s90_prior
FROM
    events
WHERE
    and(equals(event, 'scroll_depth_milestone'), notEquals(properties.$pathname, NULL), greaterOrEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-04-15')), lessOrEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-05-12')))
GROUP BY
    path
ORDER BY
    plus(s75_cur, s75_prior) DESC
LIMIT 40
